  1. io.bloviate.ext

Package io.bloviate.ext

package io.bloviate.ext
  • Class
    Description
    AbstractDatabaseSupport
    Base DatabaseSupport that maps columns to generators through a JDBCType-keyed registry of GeneratorFactory entries.
    BulkLoadHandle
    An opaque token returned by DatabaseSupport.disableConstraints(Connection, Database) describing what was disabled, so DatabaseSupport.enableConstraints(Connection, Database, BulkLoadHandle) can restore it.
    BulkLoadUnsupportedException
    Signals that a DatabaseSupport could not disable constraint enforcement for an UNORDERED_BULK fill — for example, the connecting role lacks the privilege to set PostgreSQL's session_replication_role.
    CockroachDBSupport
    CockroachDB-specific DatabaseSupport.
    DatabaseSupport
    Database-specific support interface for data generation and SQL handling.
    DefaultSupport
    Fallback DatabaseSupport for generic or unknown JDBC databases.
    GeneratorFactory
    Builds the DataGenerator used for a column of a particular JDBC type.
    GeneratorPlugin
    Service-provider interface that lets a jar contribute custom generator rules to a GeneratorRegistry without subclassing DatabaseSupport.
    GeneratorRegistry
    A user-facing registry of custom GeneratorFactory rules that lets callers override data generation without subclassing DatabaseSupport.
    GeneratorRegistry.Builder
    Builds an immutable GeneratorRegistry.
    H2Support
    H2-specific DatabaseSupport.
    MariaDBSupport
    MariaDB-specific DatabaseSupport.
    MySQLSupport
    MySQL-specific DatabaseSupport.
    PostgresSupport
    PostgreSQL-specific DatabaseSupport.
    SQLiteSupport
    SQLite-specific DatabaseSupport.

Bloviate API Reference · bloviate.io
